creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 216111
liburcu

As you can read I once created this port.
Then somebody enthusiast asked to become maintainer.
As she or he was more involved with the project I gladly handed it over.
But now I discovered it's not having a maintainer anymore.
As it's required in dns/knot2, I gladly take care of this port again.
